<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Rfc4122; use Ramsey\Uuid\Uuid; /** * The max UUID is a special form of UUID that has all 128 bits set to one (`1`) * * @link https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9562#section-5.10 RFC 9562, 5.10. Max UUID * * @immutable */ final class MaxUuid extends Uuid implements UuidInterface { }
